full_rule: Matrix gate for RANGE: action=range_carry_reversion | preferred=['carry', 'range_reversion', 'mean_reversion'] | conditional=[] | blocked=['carry', 'expansion_scalp', 'mean_reversion', 'range_reversion', 'trend_breakout', 'trend_pullback'] | reason=range regime should favor carry and reversion families

Matrix gate for TREND: action=trend_continuation | preferred=['trend_breakout', 'trend_pullback'] | conditional=['mean_reversion'] | blocked=['carry', 'expansion_scalp', 'mean_reversion', 'range_reversion', 'trend_breakout', 'trend_pullback'] | reason=trend regime should favor continuation families first

Matrix gate for EXPANSION: action=expansion_scalp | preferred=['expansion_scalp', 'trend_breakout'] | conditional=[] | blocked=['carry', 'expansion_scalp', 'mean_reversion', 'range_reversion', 'trend_breakout', 'trend_pullback', 'funding_harvest'] | reason=expansion regime should prioritize burst capture and avoid carry
